PostToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty' | grep -q 'git commit'; then npm run lint --silent 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

PreToolUse.command: if [ "$TOOL_NAME" = 'Write' ] || [ "$TOOL_NAME" = 'Edit' ]; then FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi
